text: Stepping into the clean, well-lit hallway and gazing through glass at the exhibit beyond, I feel a sense of anticipation. The space feels contemplative but corporate; the sterile orderliness is slightly distancing, yet inviting me forward. Upon entering the R+D room, my mind quickens: the colors and displays pulse with a promise of new ideas. I sense both the excitement of innovation and the quiet anxiety of not knowing what lies ahead. I feel at once curious and cautious—a stranger on the cusp of discovery.
